S.FORM: Uzbekistan Itini i 41 00 N, 64 00 E, noAsiya ko Uzbekistan. Polong no sekalay i 447,400 sq km "saka 57 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 425,400 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 22,000 sq km " Polong i 29,473,614 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 62.60%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 7.70%, malo no roma to a sera 29.70%. siyoto O (((Tashkent)) ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakasiwa 1 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Shavkat Mirziyoyev, patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 14 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: o~u~u*b~b~v…ôkistan itini i ** ** n, ** ** …ô, no~uasija ko~u o~u~u*b~b~v…ôkistan. po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u s…ôka…ĺaj i ***,*** s* km "saka ** ko~u rajraj no~u ŇčaŇčan. " "o~u s…ôka…ĺaj no~u s…ôra i, ***,*** s* km, no~u nano~um a s…ôka…ĺaj i, **,*** s* km " po~u…ĺo~uŇč i **,***,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. s…ôra masaki…ĺa ¶ ko~u s…ôra o~u ma…ĺo~u kakao~umańß…ôn a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ki…ĺaki…ĺaŇčan a s…ôra *.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ro~uma to~u a s…ôra **.**%. sijo~uto~u o~u (((tasńßk…ônt)) ko~u sijo~uto~u. kato~umir…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ pińßirat…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i sakasiwa * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit anini i ¶i sńßab~vkat mir*ijo~uj…ôb~v, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw ¶ia ***
S.FORM: Uzbekistan Itini i 41 00 N, 64 00 E, noAsiya ko Uzbekistan. Polong no sekalay i 447,400 sq km "saka 57 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 425,400 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 22,000 sq km " Polong i 29,473,614 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 62.60%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 7.70%, malo no roma to a sera 29.70%. siyoto O (((Tashkent)) ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakasiwa 1 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Shavkat Mirziyoyev, patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 14 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
